allow: Bash(sqlite3 /c/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite "SELECT translations.value FROM translations INNER JOIN DungeonData ON translations.id = DungeonData.nameId WHERE DungeonData.id = 1 AND translations.lang = ''en'';")

Bash(sqlite3 /c/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite "SELECT translations.value FROM translations INNER JOIN QuestData ON translations.id = QuestData.nameId WHERE QuestData.id = 18 AND translations.lang = ''en'';")

Bash(sqlite3 "C:/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite" "SELECT qc.id, qc.nameId, t.value FROM QuestCategoryData qc JOIN translations t ON t.id = CAST\(qc.nameId AS TEXT\) WHERE t.lang=''fr'' LIMIT 20;")

Bash(sqlite3 "C:/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite" "SELECT d.id as dungeonId, d.nameId as dungeonNameId, qc.id as categoryId, count\(q.id\) as questCount FROM DungeonData d JOIN QuestCategoryData qc ON qc.nameId = d.nameId JOIN QuestData q ON q.categoryId = qc.id WHERE q.isDungeonQuest=1 GROUP BY d.id LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 "C:/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite" "SELECT sa.id, sa.dungeonId, sa.nameId, t.value FROM SubAreaData sa JOIN translations t ON t.id = CAST\(sa.nameId AS TEXT\) WHERE sa.dungeonId > 0 AND t.lang=''fr'' LIMIT 10;")
Bash(sqlite3 "C:/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite" "SELECT id, nameId, dungeonId FROM SubAreaData WHERE dungeonId=1;")
Bash(sqlite3 "C:/users/mledo/dev/dofus-db-claude/dofus.sqlite" "SELECT * FROM QuestObjectiveDiscoverSubAreaData WHERE parameters LIKE ''%82%'' LIMIT 10;")
